query:
UPDATE agentActivityLogs
SET 
  status = 'completed',
  completedAt = startedAt + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE,
  resultSummary = '任務已完成（系統自動修正：任務完成時未正確記錄狀態）'
WHERE status = 'started'
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) > 30;

  status = 'completed',
  completedAt = startedAt + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE,
  resultSummary = '任務已完成（系統自動修正：任務完成時未正確記錄狀態）'
WHERE status = 'started'
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) > 30;
